/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/NovaShell.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/NovaShell.dir/NovaShell_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaShell.dir/home/kk/NovaShell/CLI/main.c.o CMakeFiles/NovaShell.dir/home/kk/NovaShell/CLI/shell.c.o -o NovaShell  libNovaShellCore.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libreadline.so
